Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CARL GUERRIERI OF THE BAUMAN LOEWE WITT & MAXWELL, TEL. NO.
(480) 502-4664 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARK A. WEINSTEIN OF THE VEATCH CARLSON LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 381-2861 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Aries Construction Corporation's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE WAS NO EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AT THE TIME DEFAULT WAS ENTERED AND DEFENDANTS HAVE CHOSEN NOT TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT AND IS NOT BASED BY VIRTUE OF ATTORNEY TAKING RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE DEFAULT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
